observations.summary: Stale test-file headers persist for a 7th story (3.4, 3.7, 3.8, 3.9, 3.10, 3.11, 3.12); the review-tests guard (updated 3.7, 3.9, 3.11) is working — it fixed 6 stale markers directly — but the root cause persists: implement-story un-skips tests without updating test-file headers, and prepare-tests adds scaffolding to existing files without updating story coverage lists.
observations.evidence: _bmad-output/test-artifacts/test-review-validation-report-3-12.md:76-128 — 6 stale/incomplete markers fixed: Fix 1 (session-events.service.spec.ts:13 — stale RED PHASE header claimed 'all tests skipped until implementation lands' but all 6 tests were active; fixed to GREEN PHASE), Fixes 2-6 (conversations.service.spec.ts, manual-commit.service.spec.ts, sandbox.service.nfr-s1.spec.ts, ConversationPane.test.tsx, sandbox-lifecycle.integration.spec.ts — story lists and coverage lines didn't mention Story 3.12 despite active 3.12 tests). Journal step_end for review-tests confirms '6 stale transitional markers fixed'. No trace exists for this run (no trace directory at _bmad-output/pipeline/traces/3.12-a1-20260706T122634/) — evidence from journal excerpt + produced artifact. Ledger entries 23 (3.4), 32 (3.7), 36 (3.8), 42 (3.9), 51 (3.10), 58 (3.11) record prior occurrences; ledger entries 34 (3.7), 46 (3.9), 62 (3.11) record update_steps to review-tests. Playbook implement-story prompt (updatedAt: 2026-07-06T05:41:22.969Z) says 'remove its skip marker' but does not instruct updating test-file headers.

observations.summary: Prior observation (ledger entry 33, Story 3.7; ledger entry 61, Story 3.11) — the pattern did NOT recur in 3.12: the 3.7 update_step is working, as prepare-tests performed the mock-feasibility check and correctly deferred all 3 ACs (backend-internal: SIGTERM trigger, Postgres persistence, onModuleDestroy drain logic — no browser-level mock can simulate them); browser-observable parts covered by component tests. amendments.prompt: Develop story autonomously, completing every task listed in the story spec before finishing. Before marking the story complete, re-read project-context.md and verify each non-functional pattern documented there has been applied to your changes where applicable — apply any missing patterns before finishing, do not wait for the NFR review to catch them. As each task makes a skipped test pass, remove its skip marker and update any test-file headers that claim tests are skipped, disabled, or in a red-phase state to reflect that the tests are now active, and update story coverage lists in those headers to include the current story — the story is not complete while skipped tests or stale test-file headers remain for done tasks. For any decision that arises, consult @_bmad-output/decision-policy.md before escalating: if a rule covers it, decide and continue. HALT only for decisions no rule covers.
amendments.rationale: The implement-story step has un-skipped tests without updating test-file headers in 7 stories (3.4, 3.7, 3.8, 3.9, 3.10, 3.11, 3.12), forcing the review-tests step to fix stale markers; directing the agent to update headers when activating skipped tests addresses the root cause and reduces rework.
